input.content:
# Build Agent Report: 260315-auto-706

## Changes

### This Implementation Fixes (from Code Review)

#### 1. Fixed Invalid HTML Nesting in LessonCard
- **File**: `src/app/(frontend)/courses/_components/LessonCard/index.tsx`
- **Issue**: The previous implementation had invalid HTML nesting (`<button><a>`) when `isSoon=true`
- **Fix**: Changed to conditional render pattern:
  - When `isSoon`: renders standalone `<Button onClick={handleLessonClick} disabled className="cursor-not-allowed">` - NO SystemLink inside
  - When NOT `isSoon`: renders `<Button asChild><SystemLink href={href}>` - normal navigation
- This follows the same pattern used in `CourseLessonCard` component

#### 2. Added Proper `disabled` Attribute
- **File**: `src/app/(frontend)/courses/_components/LessonCard/index.tsx`
- **Fix**: Added `disabled` attribute to the Button for "Soon" lessons (line 69)
- This provides better accessibility semantics compared to just using CSS cursor styling

#### 3. Fixed TypeScript `any` Type in Test Mock
- **File**: `tests/unit/components/LessonCard.test.tsx`
- **Issue**: The SystemLink mock used `any` type for props
- **Fix**: Changed to typed interface: `{ href?: string; children: React.ReactNode; onClick?: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void; className?: string }`

### Prior Runs (Already Implemented)

The following were already present in the codebase from prior runs:

1. **Content Status Fields** - `src/server/payload/fields/contentStatus.ts`
2. **Collections** - Courses.ts and Lessons.ts with contentStatusFields
3. **ContentStatusBadge Component** - `src/ui/web/shared/ContentStatusBadge/index.tsx`
4. **CourseCard Component** - `src/app/(frontend)/courses/_components/CourseCard/index.tsx`
5. **CourseLessonCard Component** - `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/_components/CourseLessonCard/index.tsx`
6. **Query Filtering** - courses.ts and lessons.ts with contentStatusVisible filters
7. **Translations** - en.json and he.json with soonBadge, justAddedBadge, contentLocked

## Tests Written/Updated

- `tests/unit/components/LessonCard.test.tsx` — 9 tests (UPDATED - fixed `any` type)

## Tests Verified (All Passing)

All content-status related tests continue to pass:
- `tests/unit/components/CourseCard.test.tsx` — 12 tests
- `tests/unit/components/CourseLessonCard.test.tsx` — 6 tests
- `tests/unit/components/ContentStatusBadge.test.tsx` — 10 tests
- `tests/unit/components/LessonCard.test.tsx` — 9 tests (UPDATED)

**Total**: 37 content-status component tests passing

## Deviations

- None — all review issues fixed

## Quality

- TypeScript: PASS (`pnpm tsc --noEmit`)
- Lint: PASS (`pnpm lint`)
- All 37 content-status tests: PASS

## Notes

- The implementation now uses proper conditional rendering to avoid invalid HTML nesting
- The "Soon" button is properly disabled with both `disabled` attribute and cursor styling
- This follows the exact pattern from CourseLessonCard component

5: ### Feature Implementation: Content Status Badging ("Soon" & "Just Added")
6: 
7: The feature has been fully implemented across the codebase:
8: 
9: 1. **Content Status Fields** (`src/server/payload/fields/contentStatus.ts`):
10:    - `contentStatus` select field (None/Soon/Just Added)
11:    - `contentStatusVisible` toggle for "Soon" content
12:    - `contentStatusExpiresAt` date for auto-expiry
13: 
14: 2. **Collections Updated**:
15:    - `Courses.ts` — Added contentStatusFields
16:    - `Lessons.ts` — Added contentStatusFields
17: 
18: 3. **ContentStatusBadge Component** (`src/ui/web/shared/ContentStatusBadge/index.tsx`):
19:    - Gray badge for "Soon" (neutral styling with bg-muted)
20:    - Green badge with pulse animation for "Just Added"
21:    - Handles expiry date checking
22:    - Uses translations
23: 
24: 4. **CourseCard Integration** (`src/app/(frontend)/courses/_components/CourseCard/index.tsx`):
25:    - Badge in top-right corner
26:    - Locked behavior for "Soon" courses (toast message, disabled button)
27: 
28: 5. **LessonCard Integration** (`src/app/(frontend)/courses/_components/LessonCard/index.tsx`):

30:    - Locked behavior using conditional rendering:
31:      - When `isSoon`: standalone `<Button disabled>` (valid HTML)
32:      - When not `isSoon`: `<Button asChild><SystemLink>`
33: 
34: 6. **CourseLessonCard Integration** (`src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/_components/CourseLessonCard/index.tsx`):

37:

# Build Agent Report: 260315-auto-706

## Changes

### Feature Implementation: Content Status Badging ("Soon" & "Just Added")

The feature has been fully implemented across the codebase:

1. **Content Status Fields** (`src/server/payload/fields/contentStatus.ts`):

   - `Lessons.ts` — Added contentStatusFields

3. **ContentStatusBadge Component** (`src/ui/web/shared/ContentStatusBadge/index.tsx`):
   - Gray badge for "Soon" (neutral styling with bg-muted)
   - Green badge with pulse animation for "Just Added"
